---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for ElementaryApp
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you would like.

## Use case

Describe the problem or workflow this feature would address. Who benefits and why?

## Proposed solution

Describe how you envision the feature working. Include details on UI, API endpoints, data model changes, etc.

## Alternatives considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Phase alignment

If this feature aligns with an existing phase in `docs/phase-plan.md`, note which phase (6-12).

## Additional context

Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.
